dict.string: com.acmvit.conclave
google
$(GOOGLE_IOS_CLIENT_ID)
$(GOOGLE_IOS_CLIENT_ID)
$(GOOGLE_IOS_REVERSED_CLIENT_ID)
$(CONCLAVE_AUTH_BASE_URL)
Conclave uses the camera so you can turn on your video in a meeting.
Conclave uses the microphone so you can be heard in a meeting.
Conclave uses Bluetooth so you can route meeting audio through supported headphones and speakers.
Conclave uses Bluetooth so you can route meeting audio through supported headphones and speakers.
Conclave uses the local network to connect your call's audio and video to other people, for faster and more reliable meetings.
Conclave uses screen capture so you can share your screen in a meeting.
Conclave uses photo library access only when you choose an image from your library.
Conclave saves images to your photo library only when you choose to save them.
Conclave uses your location only when you explicitly choose to share it.
Conclave uses background location only while a location-sharing action you started remains active.
Conclave uses background location only while a location-sharing action you started remains active.
Conclave uses precise location only when you explicitly choose to share your current location in a meeting.
Conclave uses Face ID only when you choose biometric verification for account access.
Conclave uses contacts only when you choose to select someone to invite to a meeting.
Conclave uses calendar access only when you choose to create or view meeting calendar events.
Conclave uses calendar access only when you choose to create or view meeting calendar events.
Conclave can add meeting events to your calendar only when you choose to save them.
Conclave uses reminders only when you choose to create a meeting reminder.
Conclave uses reminders only when you choose to create a meeting reminder.
public
$(SFU_JOIN_URL)
